relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains investment debit/credit instructions from the investments department, while the outbound file contains salary credit transactions for employees. These represent fundamentally different business domains (investment fund transactions vs. payroll), with no overlapping transaction purposes, recipient types, or field semantics. The inbound schema describes fund-based financial instructions with IBANs and fund identifiers; the outbound schema describes employee salary payments with personal bank accounts and employee details. No meaningful field correspondence exists.
